option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
<groupId>networktool_v3</groupId> <artifactId>nettool</artifactId> <version>3.0.0</version> <packaging>jar</packaging>
<properties> <maven.compiler.source>21</maven.compiler.source> <maven.compiler.target>21</maven.compiler.target> <project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding> <junit.version>5.10.2</junit.version> </properties>
<dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>org.junit.jupiter</groupId> <artifactId>junit-jupiter</artifactId> <version>${junit.version}</version> <scope>test</scope> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.junit.jupiter</groupId> <artifactId>junit-jupiter-api</artifactId> <version>${junit.version}</version> <scope>test</scope> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.junit.jupiter</groupId> <artifactId>junit-jupiter-engine</artifactId> <version>${junit.version}</version> <scope>test</scope> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.junit.jupiter</groupId> <artifactId>junit-jupiter-params</artifactId> <version>${junit.version}</version> <scope>test</scope> </dependency> </dependencies>
<build> <sourceDirectory>src</sourceDirectory> <testSourceDirectory>test</testSourceDirectory>
<plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId> <version>3.13.0</version> <configuration> <source>22</source> <target>22</target> <encoding>UTF-8</encoding> <!-- Parallel compilation limited for weak hardware --> <compilerArgs> <arg>-J-Xmx512m</arg> </compilerArgs> </configuration> </plugin>
<plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-surefire-plugin</artifactId> <version>3.2.5</version> <configuration> <useModulePath>false</useModulePath> <!-- Parallel test execution limited to 1 per CPU core --> <forkCount>1</forkCount> <reuseForks>true</reuseForks> <!-- Increased timeout for slow hardware --> <forkedProcessTimeoutInSeconds>300</forkedProcessTimeoutInSeconds> <argLine>-Xmx512m -Xms128m</argLine> </configuration> </plugin>
<plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-jar-plugin</artifactId> <version>3.3.0</version> <configuration> <archive> <manifest> <mainClass>networktool.Main</mainClass> </manifest> </archive> <finalName>nettool</finalName> </configuration> </plugin> </plugins> </build> </project>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
<groupId>networktool_v3</groupId> <artifactId>nettool</artifactId> <version>3.0.0</version> <packaging>jar</packaging>
<properties> <maven.compiler.source>21</maven.compiler.source> <maven.compiler.target>21</maven.compiler.target> <project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding> <junit.version>5.10.2</junit.version> </properties>
<dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>org.junit.jupiter</groupId> <artifactId>junit-jupiter</artifactId> <version>${junit.version}</version> <scope>test</scope> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.junit.jupiter</groupId> <artifactId>junit-jupiter-api</artifactId> <version>${junit.version}</version> <scope>test</scope> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.junit.jupiter</groupId> <artifactId>junit-jupiter-engine</artifactId> <version>${junit.version}</version> <scope>test</scope> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.junit.jupiter</groupId> <artifactId>junit-jupiter-params</artifactId> <version>${junit.version}</version> <scope>test</scope> </dependency> </dependencies>
<build> <sourceDirectory>src</sourceDirectory> <testSourceDirectory>test</testSourceDirectory>
<plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId> <version>3.13.0</version> <configuration> <source>22</source> <target>22</target> <encoding>UTF-8</encoding> <!-- Parallel compilation limited for weak hardware --> <compilerArgs> <arg>-J-Xmx512m</arg> </compilerArgs> </configuration> </plugin>
<plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-surefire-plugin</artifactId> <version>3.2.5</version> <configuration> <useModulePath>false</useModulePath> <!-- Parallel test execution limited to 1 per CPU core --> <forkCount>1</forkCount> <reuseForks>true</reuseForks> <!-- Increased timeout for slow hardware --> <forkedProcessTimeoutInSeconds>300</forkedProcessTimeoutInSeconds> <argLine>-Xmx512m -Xms128m</argLine> </configuration> </plugin>
<plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-jar-plugin</artifactId> <version>3.3.0</version> <configuration> <archive> <manifest> <mainClass>networktool.Main</mainClass> </manifest> </archive> <finalName>nettool</finalName> </configuration> </plugin>
<plugin> <groupId>org.jacoco</groupId> <artifactId>jacoco-maven-plugin</artifactId> <version>0.8.11</version> <executions> <execution> <goals> <goal>prepare-agent</goal> </goals> </execution> <execution> <id>report</id> <phase>test</phase> <goals> <goal>report</goal> </goals> </execution> <execution> <id>coverage-check</id> <phase>verify</phase> <goals> <goal>check</goal> </goals> <configuration> <rules> <rule> <element>PACKAGE</element> <excludes> <exclude>*Test</exclude> </excludes> <limits> <limit> <counter>LINE</counter> <value>COVEREDRATIO</value> <minimum>0.90</minimum> </limit> </limits> </rule> </rules> </configuration> </execution> </executions> </plugin> </plugins> </build> </project>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
